content.situation: 项目成功完成后，团队领导在会议结束时向全体成员表达感谢，你作为团队成员回应以表达认可和感激。
content.speakerText: I just want to say how impressed I am with everyone’s dedication—this wouldn’t have been possible without you.
content.speakerTextCn: 我想说，我对大家的投入印象深刻——没有你们，这一切都不可能实现。
content.responseTemplate: ___, and I really appreciate the chance to work with such a talented team.
content.hint: 当别人真诚感谢你时，先回应对方的肯定，再表达自己的感受。
content.knowledgePoint: 表达感激与认可的礼貌回应结构

content.situation: 项目结束后，同事在 Slack 上发消息说：'Big win! Huge thanks to everyone who stayed late and kept pushing.' 你希望积极回应并强化团队凝聚力。
content.speakerText: Big win! Huge thanks to everyone who stayed late and kept pushing.
content.speakerTextCn: 大获成功！衷心感谢所有加班坚持到底的伙伴。
content.responseTemplate: ___—it was awesome seeing everyone pull together under pressure.
content.hint: 用简短有力的词表示强烈认同，接着补充具体正面观察，让回应更真诚。
content.knowledgePoint: 积极回应团队认可的高频连接词与结构

content.situation: 项目复盘会上，项目经理说：'Let’s make sure we recognize each other’s efforts before we wrap up.' 你打算主动表达对一位同事的感谢。
content.speakerText: Let’s make sure we recognize each other’s efforts before we wrap up.
content.speakerTextCn: 在收尾前，让我们互相认可一下彼此的付出。
content.responseTemplate: I really want to thank ___ for how calmly they handled the last-minute changes.
content.hint: 感谢时要具体指明对象，避免笼统说'everyone'，才能体现真诚。
content.knowledgePoint: 具体化感谢对象的表达方式
